actionCalls.description: Notifies the main practitioner via email that there was an error with the form
actionCalls.name: Notify_Main_Practitioner
actionCalls.label: Notify Main Practitioner

value.stringValue: Action Required: Error Occurred on Patient Demographic Form for {!First_Name} {!Last_Name}

assignments.name: Assign_Required_But_Not_Selected_PAC
assignments.label: Assign Required But Not Selected PAC

assignments.description: If Same as Billing Is Checked then we need to set the field for same as shipping
assignments.name: Set_Address_As_Shipping_Address
assignments.label: Set Address As Shipping Address

assignments.name: Set_Default_Values_for_New_Account
assignments.label: Set Default Values for New Account

assignments.name: Set_Default_Values_New_Patient_Agreement
assignments.label: Set Default Values - New Patient Agreement

assignments.name: Set_Existing_Patient_Account_Id_and_Main_Practitioner
assignments.label: Set Existing Patient Account Id and Main Practitioner

assignments.description: This will invalidate the link for the customer. This is extra security layer.
assignments.name: Set_Valid_Thru_Date
assignments.label: Set Valid Thru Date

decisions.name: Check_All_Required_PAC_Selected
decisions.label: Check All Required PAC Selected?
decisions.defaultConnectorLabel: If All Required PAC Not Selected

decisions.name: Check_If_Any_Agreement_Is_Selected
decisions.label: Check If Any Agreement Is Selected

rules.name: If_Patient_Agreement_Is_Not_Null
rules.label: If Patient Agreement Is Not Null

decisions.name: Did_we_find_a_duplicate_Account
decisions.label: Did we find a duplicate Account

decisions.name: Does_Billing_Address_Need_to_Be_Set
decisions.label: Does Billing Address Need to Be Set

decisions.description: Determine if we need to Prompt the user to enter in a user key or not.
decisions.name: Is_New_Patient
decisions.label: Is New Patient

decisions.description: If it is a new patient we need to set Main Practitioner
decisions.name: Is_New_Patient_Set_Main_Practitioner
decisions.label: Is New Patient - Set Main Practitioner

decisions.name: Is_New_Patient_Set_Patient_Agreements
decisions.label: Is New Patient - Set Patient Agreements

decisions.description: If Same as Billing is Checked we need to copy the billing address to the shipping address fields.
decisions.name: Is_Same_As_Billing_Checked
decisions.label: Is Same As Billing Checked

decisions.description: Check if Employee Id was passed to the flow. If yes, that employee needs to be assigned as owner
decisions.name: Was_Employee_Id_passed_in
decisions.label: Was Employee Id passed in

loops.name: Loop_Through_All_Patient_Agreement_Configuration
loops.label: Loop Through All Patient Agreement Configuration.

recordCreates.description: This will create a case signifying to the support reps that the customer updated their information.
recordCreates.name: Create_Case_Customer_Updated_Portal
recordCreates.label: Create Case - Customer Updated Portal

recordLookups.description: Check if there is another Account record with matching email or drivers license
recordLookups.name: Check_for_duplicate_Accounts
recordLookups.label: Check for duplicate Accounts

recordLookups.description: Quick Duplicate check based on email.
recordLookups.name: Get_Accounts_Match_Email
recordLookups.label: Get Accounts - Match Email

fields.name: demographicTitle
fields.fieldText:
{!$Label.Style_Header_Gray}

Please Enter Your Demographic Data

fields.name: display_Package_Error_Message
fields.fieldText: Please select required agreements: {!txt_RequiredPACNotSelected}

fields.name: txt_BillingAddress
fields.fieldText:
{!$Label.Style_Header_Gray}

Billing Address

fields.name: txt_ShippingAddress
fields.fieldText:
{!$Label.Style_Header_Gray}

Shipping Address

fields.name: txt_HeaderCreditCard
fields.fieldText:
{!$Label.Style_Header_Gray}

Credit Card Information

validationRule.errorMessage: Enter only the credit card number, don't add in any addiotnal characters or symbols.
Enter only numbers and a max of 4 numbers
﻿Enter the digits of the Month.
Enter only the 4 digit year of the credit card

fields.name: txtErrorInsertingNewAccount
fields.fieldText: There was an issue creating a new patient record because of error code: {!txt_CaseError}. Please manually create in the CRM.

screens.description: Show this screen when the key doens't exist.
screens.name: Key_Doesn_t_Exist
screens.label: Key Doesn't Exist

fields.name: keyDoesntExist
fields.fieldText: Apologies, but it seems the key you entered is invalid. Please double-check for any spaces at the front or end. If the issue persists, contact our support team at support@10xhealthsystem.com. Thank you.

fields.name: header_1
fields.fieldText: Welcome to the Patient Support Portal

fields.name: keyInvalid
fields.fieldText: Apologies, but the entered key is no longer valid. Please request a new key by emailing our support team at support@10xhealthsystem.com. Thank you.

fields.name: thankYouMessage
fields.fieldText: Thank you for updating your demographic data! Your cooperation is greatly appreciated. We're here to support you on your healthcare journey. If you need any further assistance, feel free to reach out. Take care!

textTemplates.name: txt_CaseDescription
textTemplates.text: We have received an update on the patient's account information. Kindly ensure that the details have been synchronized with DrChrono and conclude any outstanding cases related to this once the task is completed.

textTemplates.name: txt_CaseDescriptionError

textTemplates.description: Text template used as an email body for notifying the main practitioner in case of form error
textTemplates.name: txt_EmailBodyError
textTemplates.text:
There was an issue creating a new patient record because of error code:

{!txt_CaseError}


Please follow the SOP to resolve the issue:

https://10xhealthsystem.atlassian.net/wiki/spaces/1TH/pages/152043536/How+to+Diagnose+Problems+with+the+Patient+Demographic+Portal


Regards,

10X Health

Main: 305.682.1818

Fax: 786.598.8612

10xhealthsystem.com

textTemplates.name: txt_UserInputInDemographicScreen
txt_UserPressedButton

variables.description: this will hold as either the record that will be used in the update or the creation of a patient
variables.name: rec_Account
